title: Stacks, Queues, Deques, and Monotonic Structures · Invariant Lens: Adt Contracts
summary: Coordinate undo history, request scheduling, and sliding-window alerts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa adt contracts increment in a suite of bounded linear abstract data types.
